Intended Use: Draft quotes from inbound RFQ emails using historical pricing
Data Inputs: RFQ emails, price history, material costs
Risk Description: Incorrect pricing sent to customer if approval step is bypassed
Existing Controls: One-click human approval required before send; full action log
Additional Controls Required: Quarterly output sampling audit; pricing guardrail thresholds

Intended Use: Convert operator photos/voice notes into structured NCR records
Data Inputs: Defect photos, voice notes, part numbers
Existing Controls: QM reviews every NCR before disposition; severity flagged for human decision
Additional Controls Required: Add second-check rule for safety-critical part families

Intended Use: Unsanctioned general-purpose assistant use by staff
Data Inputs: Unknown - potentially drawings, customer data, pricing
Risk Description: IP and customer data exfiltration via consumer AI tools
Additional Controls Required: Acceptable-use policy; sanctioned alternative deployed; DLP monitoring; training
